root.sql: select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '1' )as collname1 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '2' )as collname2 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '3' )as collname3 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '4' )as collname4 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in ('02','03','04','05') )as collateral_description ,(select (case when sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '02' then 'หุ้นค้ำประกัน' when sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '03' then 'เงินฝากค้ำประกัน' when sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '04' then 'อสังหาริมทรัพย์' when sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '05' then 'ห้องชุด' end) from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in ('02','03','04','05') )as collateral_other from sc_lon_m_loan_request where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type in ('20','21','22','24') /*WHERE*/ --where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = '6525000010'
